arts.ttl: Mike McGrath reveals when Leeds United plan to begin ER expansion
arts.sum: Leeds United are planning to expand Elland Road soon up to a 53,000 capacity, and those plans will become much more tangible once the club are promoted back to the Premier League. Now, the Telegraph’s Mike McGrath has reported that the club are now expected to start expanding the stadium as soon as they are promoted back to the top flight:

arts.ttl: Leeds United are already two games away from nightmare three-fold scenario
arts.sum: Ethan Ampadu, Daniel James, Manor Solomon and Max Wober are definitely out, while Ilia Gruev is extremely doubtful pending a knee scan and Isaac Schmidt has the best chance of returning to the squad. arts.ttl: Leeds: Brenden Aaronson named in USMNT squad
arts.sum: Leeds United are in the midst of a midfield crisis at the moment with Ethan Ampadu and Ilia Gruev suffering knee injuries, and the international break won’t give Daniel Farke’s squad any respite as of yet. While Farke confirmed on Wednesday that the midfielder has suffered a knee injury, the results of his scan are yet to be revealed, casting doubt over his availability in the rest of 2024 like Ampadu.

arts.ttl: Sunderland chief can't hide admiration for Leeds United star ahead of heavyweight clash
arts.sum: “We know Leeds are a strong team ready for promotion I think, with many strengths, in possession, out of possession, counter-attacks, and they are well managed,” said Le Bris. Sunderland head coach Regis Le Bris is wary of the strengths Leeds United possess ahead of tomorrow's Championship clash at the Stadium of Light, insisting: "We need to respect every team.”

arts.ttl: No Leeds United reunion for Ian Poveda and Sunderland's big defensive dilemma
arts.sum: “At the minute with the physical issue, the way we can manage the game is with an intelligence perspective as a team. Le Bris said that the players are showing a good intensity in training as they battle for first-team places.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke discusses decision to “unleash” Leeds United teen debut a la Archie Gray
arts.sum: Leeds United midfielder Charlie Crew is yet to make his senior debut for the club despite being heavily involved in pre-season, but Daniel Farke is considering it. Speaking about the 18-year-old pre-Sunderland, Farke wanted to cool talk of Crew emulating Archie Gray with a teenage debut, who took the lineup by storm last season.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke responds to claims Leeds should be Championship promotion favourites
arts.sum: Leeds are many bookmakers' favourites to win the Championship after they were narrowly beaten by Southampton in May's play-off final at Wembley

arts.ttl: Patrick Bamford and Kalvin Phillips on same page over Leeds United icon Marcelo Bielsa
arts.sum: “I think he [Bielsa] was the harshest on Kalv,” former teammate Bamford told his My Mate’s A Footballer podcast. Speaking as a guest of Bamford's on the podcast, Phillips said: “I think what Pat is talking about is we would always have to lose loads of weight.
